title: CGT Daily News - March 13, 2026
description:
Today's CGT news highlights:
- A simpler form of DNA may be key to non-viral gene therapy, study suggests
- Ultragenyx gene therapy hits co-primary endpoint in phase 3 rare disease study, teeing up potential win
- Regenxbio posts clean safety profile for DMD gene therapy as pivotal data loom
- Study suggests long non-coding RNA has potential as new class of genetic medicine
- How a new tool for large-scale gene editing could power novel genetic medicines
- China is going after the world's most expensive drugs: Endpoints Signal
